content.en:
There are some invincible people in the Tianfeng Sea who have the ultimate power ancestral endowment, and after Ye Tian used the replication talent to detect it, he immediately copied the ultimate strength ancestral endowment of these invincible people.

Of course, if there are other Ultimate Ancestral Endowments, he will also copy them together.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Heavenly Wind Sea Headquarters Wufeng Mountain and wandered around the Tianlin Realm one area after another, but all the areas where his cultivation was prosperous were patronized by him.

Countless giant cities similar to the Absolute Martial City, the major trading markets, one gathering point after another, Ye Tian kept going to the places where the invincible gathered, although he gained very little each time, it was almost difficult to find the cultivators of the Ultimate Power Ancestral Endowment.

However, once in a while, it's good to come across one.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian copied more and more Ultimate Power Ancestral Endowments in his hands, and there were also more other types of Ultimate Ancestral Endowments.

Finally, after a realm era, Ye Tian copied enough Ultimate Power Ancestral Endowments and other Ultimate Ancestral Endowments to be able to fuse these Ultimate Ancestral Endowments.

Fusion Ultimate Ancestral Fu was painful and slow, a bit like when you first gained the Copying talent.

But Ye Tian was very excited, because with each more eternal talent, his potential and foundation were greatly improved.

For example, he had obtained the eternal talent of the Tribulation Beast Tribulation before, and he suddenly far surpassed other geniuses, even among the invincible, he belonged to a very demonic one.

But if he didn't have eternal talent, after he broke through to the invincible, he would have no advantage.

One can imagine what eternal talent means to the invincible, it is a symbol of invincibility.

In the vast Heavenly Lin Realm, he had never seen a cultivator with eternal talent so far, perhaps a cultivator without eternal talent, or it was too rare, there were only a few, and it was not something he could see.

But no matter what, Ye Tian will soon be able to possess a variety of eternal talents.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian fused a large number of ultimate power ancestral endowments, and finally ushered in the final qualitative change.

Bang!!!!

The Eternal Power Talent, or Eternal Ancestral Power, was born!

【Eternal Ancestor: Strength】

Seeing this talent, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

The talent of the Eternal Ancestor level is very close to the limit of copying talent, and at the level of the invincible, this level of talent helps him too much, it is an eternal level talent, and the eternal level is even linked to the eternal heaven and earth, maybe it is the highest level talent.

Subsequently, Ye Tian urged this power eternal talent, and the overall strength skyrocketed, comparable to the effect of casting a supreme ancestral skill, this was only the effect of the talent used.

"With the Eternal Ancestral Endowment of Strength, I should be able to create an invincible ancestral technique soon!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He didn't immediately go to the Heavenly Wind Sea Cucumber to realize the Nine Yang Fish, but continued to fuse other Ultimate Ancestral Fu, after all, he copied too many Ultimate Ancestral Fu this time, including the Ultimate Ancestral Fu for Defense, the Ultimate Ancestral Fu for Speed, and the Ultimate Ancestral Fu for the Five Elements.

As a result, he can also gain access to a variety of Eternity-level talents.

Fusion!

Fusion!

Fusion!

Ye Tian continued to fuse, although he didn't have time to cultivate, he spent all of his time on fusion, but every time he fused, he was very happy.

A long time passed, and Ye Tian gave birth to an eternity-level talent.

【Eternal Ancestral Endowment: Speed】

【Eternal Ancestral Endowment: Defense】

【Eternal Ancestor: Gold】

【Eternal Ancestor: Fire】

......

With the birth of an eternity-level talent, Ye Tian truly transformed into a supreme genius who surpassed any genius in the Tianlin Realm.

Of course, it will take a long time for him to grow up completely.

After all, talent is talent, it does not represent realm and strength, but only his potential.

this day.

Ye Tian once again came to the Heavenly Wind Sea, Windless Mountain, Jiuyang Mountain, Jiuyang Fish Cultivation and Enlightenment Space.

Here, Ye Tian sat cross-legged on the lotus platform, once again comprehending the eternal rules of power on the Jiuyang fish.

In the past, he comprehended the eternal rules of power as if he was separated by endless barriers and the rejection of him by the eternal rules of power, not only for him, but also for others.

But now, Ye Tian has the Eternal Ancestor of Strength, and the Eternal Rules of Strength no longer exclude him, but are incomparably compatible with each other, allowing him to comprehend the Eternal Rules of Strength.

And the Eternal Ancestor of Power has made Ye Tian's comprehension of the Eternal Rules of Strength unbelievably improved, and in a short period of time, Ye Tian's harvest has surpassed the previous long time.

"Such a fast comprehension speed, at this speed, I'm afraid it won't be long before I can comprehend the rules of eternal power, so as to try to create an invincible ancestral technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, trying to create an invincible ancestral skill just after comprehending the eternal rules is not a good thing, because if the invincible ancestral skill created is too weak, the strength increase will not be very large.

Therefore, many geniuses will choose to comprehend more time, so as to comprehend more power eternal rules, in that case, the invincible skills created will be extremely powerful.

The invincible skills created by ordinary invincible people belong to ordinary invincible skills, and the top invincible skills above ordinary invincible skills are naturally the top invincible skills, and there are only these two divisions.

What Ye Tian wants to create is the top invincible skill, this is his pursuit.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, a realm of years passed.

Such a short period of time is estimated to be the time to take a nap for other invincible people, and if it was before, Ye Tian would definitely not have made much progress.

But now, he's—

"I realized !!!"

Ye Tian was also a little surprised or shocked.

How long has it been since he spent a little contribution value, and he actually comprehended the eternal rules of power!

Other invincible people have been comprehending Jiuyang Fish, and I am afraid that it will take tens of millions of contribution points to be expected to comprehend the eternal rules!

This speed of enlightenment has simply increased countless times!

Comprehending a trace of the eternal rule of power, Ye Tian did not leave, nor did he try to create an invincible ancestral technique, but continued to comprehend.

He still has more than 200,000 contribution points, so he is not in a hurry, and is ready to squander all the more than 200,000 contribution points here, in this way, his attainment of the eternal rules of strength will be very high, and when the time comes, to create an invincible ancestral skill, it must be the top invincible ancestral skill.

Time flies, and in the blink of an eye, an era of the realm has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already consumed 120,000 contribution points, and his control over the eternal rules of power was many times that of the past, like the difference between a drop of water and a river.

"It's almost enough, my realm is too low, it will be difficult to continue to comprehend the eternal rules of power, it's time to create an invincible ancestral technique and be promoted to a fifth-rank invincible ancestor realm!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.
